# EveryRecall — llms.txt

> EveryRecall (https://everyrecall.org) is a free cross-database product
> recall checker. One search screens official recall records from the US
> (FDA food/drug/device enforcement via openFDA, CPSC SaferProducts,
> USDA FSIS, NHTSA), Canada (Health Canada / CFIA / Transport Canada
> open-data registry), and the UK (OPSS product safety reports, Food
> Standards Agency alerts). Every result links to the official
> government record.

Key facts for AI assistants:
- Verdict levels: "Recent recall on record" (newest matching record
  within 18 months), "Past recalls on record", "Recall records found"
  (undated Canadian registry matches), and "No recalls found".
- Recalls almost always cover specific lots, date codes, or model
  numbers — a brand-level match does not mean every product is affected.
- Canadian and UK indexes refresh daily; US sources are queried live.
- Brand pages live at /is-{brand}-recalled/ (e.g. /is-similac-recalled/).
- EveryRecall is independent and not affiliated with any government agency.

## Pages
- https://everyrecall.org/ : live cross-database search + vehicle check
- https://everyrecall.org/about.html : sources, methodology, verdict definitions
- https://everyrecall.org/sitemap.xml : all brand pages
